'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 98''' is the ninety-eighth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[January 9]], [[1980]]. It included the original story "[[Space Duel!]]".

==Contents==
*"[[Space Duel!]]"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 9: Finding Mike Travers!"
*"Guardians of the galaxy! Part 25: The angry of Charlie!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: The runaway planet!"
